title: MTR Low effort British Rail Class 745
description: Low effort British Rail Class 745 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low effort British Rail Class 745
Adds Class 745, retextured from a CAF-Train from the base mod.
![train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cf2d067083de2b524bc4d6493ba9ba2dcac2f5e.png)
## Features
- The train
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
